subject: Outlook search returns no results for known mail
description: Search box finds nothing; user can browse folder and see the message manually.

ts_steps.title: Index status
ts_steps.action: File → Options → Search — Indexing Status; confirm mailbox indexed; rebuild if stuck.

ts_steps.title: Scope
ts_steps.action: Use Current Mailbox scope; try web Outlook search to compare server-side index.

ts_steps.title: OST size
ts_steps.action: If OST huge, consider new profile or online mode test; compact ost if supported.

internal_information: Broken Windows Search index for desktop Outlook. Exchange Online vs on-prem differs. New Outlook vs classic.
